## Acceptance Criteria
List the specific requirements and conditions that must be met for this feature to be considered complete.
 
- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3
---
 
## Definition of Done
A feature is done when **all** of the following are satisfied:
 
- [ ] Code is written and reviewed
- [ ] Unit tests are written and passing (aim for >80% coverage of new code)
- [ ] Code follows the project's style guide and standards
- [ ] Documentation has been updated (README, API docs, etc. if applicable)
- [ ] Feature has been tested manually and works as expected
- [ ] No console errors or warnings introduced
- [ ] Branch has been merged to `main` after approval
- [ ] All acceptance criteria above are met
---
